title: Add redis test to baseline
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds tests to baseline script to verify the issue reported by @bertinatto  in https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/334 doesn't reappear.

comments.body:
Not sure if my vote counds, but LGTM! :)

I just confirmed that the error that I reported in #334 is no longer happening in master.

It sure does count!  Thanks Fabio!

Tests are failing due to an unrelated issue that's being worked out.

:pushpin: Commit f581f87 has been approved by `nalind`
